event: A sermon of love — lovers in a garden
description: A moonlit garden scene showing a young couple in white and golden garments embracing near a stone monument or fountain adorned with sculpted putti and cherubs. The woman leans back dramatically while the man supports her. Large dark trees form a canopy overhead. Stone urns and architectural fragments are scattered in the overgrown garden. The palette is dominated by dark greens and warm golden highlights on the figures, creating a dreamy, romantic atmosphere.
